archetype: Archetype 1: Organic & Earthy (Adapted for Trust-focused Marketplace)

core_principles: Trust & Verification: Emphasize verified seller badges and escrow.
Mobile-First Performance: UI optimized for 360px viewport and 3G networks. Minimal decorative animations.
Clarity & Contrast: Green headers (#085041), earthy/clean backgrounds, high contrast text.
Hyper-Local Focus: Proximity and distance metrics integrated seamlessly into product cards.

spacing_and_layout.container_mobile: w-full max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-gray-50 pb-20 relative overflow-x-hidden

buttons.primary: bg-[#1D9E75] text-white hover:bg-[#168260] rounded-lg py-3 px-4 font-semibold w-full transition-colors flex justify-center items-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#1D9E75] border border-[#1D9E75] hover:bg-[#E1F5EE] rounded-lg py-3 px-4 font-semibold w-full transition-colors flex justify-center items-center gap-2
buttons.danger: bg-[#E24B4A] text-white hover:bg-red-600 rounded-lg py-3 px-4 font-semibold transition-colors

cards.product: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden flex flex-col group
cards.seller: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 p-4 flex items-center gap-3
cards.dashboard_widget: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-gray-200 p-5

badges.verified: flex items-center gap-1 text-[#1D9E75] bg-[#E1F5EE] px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-[10px] font-bold uppercase
badges.distance: flex items-center gap-1 bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
badges.category: px-4 py-2 rounded-full bg-white border border-gray-200 text-sm font-medium whitespace-nowrap text-gray-700 hover:border-[#1D9E75] hover:text-[#1D9E75] transition-colors

inputs.standard: w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg p-3 bg-white text-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1D9E75] focus:border-transparent outline-none transition-shadow
inputs.search: w-full bg-gray-100 rounded-full py-2.5 pl-10 pr-4 text-sm focus:bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1D9E75] outline-none transition-all

navigation.bottom_bar: fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-md mx-auto bg-white border-t border-gray-200 flex justify-around items-center h-16 px-2 z-50 shadow-[0_-4px_10px_-2px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)]
navigation.top_header: sticky top-0 z-40 bg-[#085041] text-white px-4 py-3 flex justify-between items-center shadow-md
navigation.desktop_sidebar: bg-[#085041] text-white w-[250px] flex flex-col h-screen fixed

promos.description: African market scene for hero banner
Street market vendor for category promos

interactions.hover_states: Hover states should visibly shift color depth (e.g., bg-[#1D9E75] to bg-[#168260]).
interactions.focus_states: Use focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1D9E75] focus:ring-offset-1 for accessibility on all inputs and buttons.
interactions.animations: Subtle and functional only. Avoid heavy layout shifts or 3D effects. Use transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out.

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react. Standard sizes: 20px for nav/buttons, 16px for inline data (like distance map-pin), 24px for main bottom navigation icons.

testing.rules: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='bottom-nav-home', data-testid='add-to-cart-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure 'Manrope' and 'IBM Plex Sans' are added to the head of index.html via Google Fonts.

Implement the mobile layout wrapping the main PWA screens in `<div className='w-full max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen relative'>` to enforce the 360px targeted mobile-first aesthetic on desktop displays.
Use Shadcn UI components for complex interactions: Slider for proximity (1-50km), Dialog for Mobile Money operator selection, and Tabs for Admin dashboard navigation.
Do NOT use transparent backgrounds for the top header. It must be solid `#085041`.
Build the 2-column product grid with `grid-cols-2 gap-3`. Product cards must show: Photo, Title, Seller Name, Verified Badge (if applicable), Price (in FC/XAF/XOF), Rating, and Distance.
Integrate the provided real media URLs for banners, products, and user avatars to maintain high-quality aesthetic output. Do NOT use dummyimage placeholders.
